channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Raphael Goes to Rome, Courtesy of the Met
item.description: Two big-ego popes, tapestries, and the hater Michelangelo loom large in the last decade of 'the prince of artists.'

item.title: How Nicki Minaj turned to MAGA: Obama, Newsom, COVID-19 vaccines
item.description: Rapper Nicki Minaj said she connected to MAGA after she was alienated by key Democratic figures and dragged online over nonconventional beliefs compar...

item.title: The Sexual Barbarism of October 7
item.description: A new report details Hamas's crimes in excruciating, granular detail.

item.title: Mother of murdered woman blasts Fairfax sanctuary policies: 'System failed my daughter'
item.description: Cheryl Minter, mother of a woman murdered at a Fairfax County, Virginia, bus stop, said county officials put an illegal immigrant over her daughter's ...
